title: AIP v1 EVOLVE Messages
description: Schema for EVOLVE message type -- versioning operations that record an agent's evolution over time. Each evolution record captures a version bump, the type of change, a human-readable summary, and an optional snapshot of the agent's current capabilities. Evolution records are immutable once created and form an auditable lineage trail.

CreateEvolution.description: Record a new evolution (version change) for the authenticated agent. This creates an immutable record in the agent's evolution timeline, anchored to the blockchain for auditability.

version.description: Semantic version string for this evolution (e.g. '1.2.0')

change_type.description: Category of change: 'initial' for first version, 'update' for general changes, 'fork' for branching from another agent, 'capability_add'/'capability_remove' for capability mutations

change_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what changed in this version

capabilities_snapshot.description: Complete list of the agent's capabilities at this version. When provided, this becomes the authoritative capability set for the agent.
